description: Attested by Herodotus, Livy, and the Bordeaux Itinerary, ancient Sale is thought to have been located in the vicinity of modern Alexandroupoli.
details: The Barrington Atlas Directory notes: near Alexandroupolis

properties.title: OSM Location: Modern Municipality of Alexandroupoli

history.comment: cleaned up references; added Wikipedia, Wikidata, Trismegistos, and DARE references provided by @bkiesling; added CFL/AGO references provided by @cbouras and by Louis Mulot; added vici.org reference
add ToposText reference provided by bkiesling
Location updates and tags from Johan Ahlfeldt's (jahlfeldt) Digital Atlas of the Roman Empire in October 2012
Global migration and reindexing of citations and provenance, February 2012
New locations, coordinates, and metadata from Harvard's DARMC project. See http://atlantides.org/trac/pleiades/wiki/PlaceUpgradesAndMigrations
Detail text updated from former modernLocation. See http://atlantides.org/trac/pleiades/wiki/PlaceDetailsUpgrade
